title: Shingeki no Craft Titans Sleep at Night
description: This is an addon for Shingeki No Craft
body:
As a fan of Shingeki no Craft, I bring to you an addon called "Titans sleep at night"

What exactly is this?
This makes pure titans inactive when there is no sunlight 

This is useful because it makes your survival world safe at night. When there is no light these titans will not move an inch. This is also lore accurate because these titans should be inactive when they lack sunlight.

As a royal blooded titan, you can convert people into abnormal titans which will have enhanced strength and speed, deadlier than regular pure titans. These titans will follow you and they will not harm you. They will kill other players though.

How to control the titans?
When you are near the titans, they will stop moving. They will start to move towards you when you walk away from them

Abnormal Titans, like in the show, do not sleep at night. They are very energetic titans unlike regular titans

SHINGEKI NO CRAFT, an Attack on Titan datapack, is needed for this to work because "Titans sleep at night" is an addon for it
